Package in.co.rays.proj4.controller

Interface ORSView

public interface ORSView
Contains Online Result System (ORS) View and Controller navigation definitions. Provides logical constant mappings for application routing paths, JSP layouts, and Servlet URL endpoints.
Version:
1.0
Author:
vinay
